title: Tender Jamaican Chicken Tagine
description: A light and flavorful Jamaican dish featuring chicken cooked in a tagine with a hint of wine, perfect for a date night, this recipe is low in fat and uses kosher salt, and is cooked and served in a bento box.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the chicken with kosher salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in the tagine over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the tagine and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic to the tagine and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken to the tagine and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the dry white wine, chicken broth, and dried thyme to the tagine.
Cover the tagine and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the chopped scallions and serve hot in a bento box.
